Where to Start?

Retirement Income Strategies Tailored to You

Coverage That Fits. Nothing You Don't Need
No Obligation · No Pressure · No Cost

Start With a Review

Before recommending anything, we want to understand exactly where you stand. These reviews are yours to keep. No strings attached.

Existing Coverage Review

Most clients discover they've been under-informed about what they already own. We go through everything so you know exactly what you have, and what gaps may exist.

  • Review of life insurance, critical illness, and accident policies
  • Identify any living benefits that are present or missing
  • Plain-English explanation of your coverages
  • Zero obligation. The knowledge is yours
Schedule Your Coverage Review

Needs Analysis

Whether you have existing coverage or none at all, a needs analysis starts from where you are. We look at your full picture: income, obligations, goals, and what's already in place. You may have more working for you than you realize. And if there are gaps, we find them together.

  • Works with or without existing coverage
  • Includes a coverage review if policies are in place
  • No assumptions. Just your situation, clearly mapped
  • You leave knowing exactly where you stand
Schedule a Needs Analysis

Retirement Introduction

Before we look at products or statements, we start with education. We walk through what inflation and market risk mean for your situation and think clearly about the income needed and the life worth protecting. Some of what you have may already be doing the right job. Some of it may have gaps. Either way, you'll leave knowing where you actually stand.

  • Retirement income strategies your broker and bank likely haven't mentioned
  • How to think about income, risk, and what matters most to you
  • First conversation. No pressure, no products.
Schedule Your Retirement Introduction

Protecting & Securing Every Stage

Working with clients across the full spectrum, with deep expertise in pre-retirement and retirement planning. Whatever the stage, the process is the same: understand first, then match the right solution.

🏠

Mortgage & Asset Protection

Life and critical illness coverages designed to protect your home, your family, and the assets built over a lifetime, ensuring what's been created doesn't disappear when life gets complicated.

📈

Retirement Income Solutions

Retirement income strategies tailored entirely to each client. The right one depends on goals, timeline, and what matters most. That's what we figure out together.

🔍

The Banks Advantage Process

Before any product conversation, we lay everything on the table: income in, income out, existing strategies, what happens if an income disappears. We start by affirming what's working, then identify what's missing. The goal is always to make sure everything is actually working as hard as it should.

What I Offer

A Full Suite of Solutions

From protecting your mortgage to building retirement income. I work across the full spectrum so the right solution is always about you, never about what I happen to sell.

Life & Protection
🏠
Mortgage Protection
Protect your home and family if the unexpected happens
📋
Term Life
Straightforward protection for a defined period
↩️
Return of Premium Term
Term coverage that returns your premiums if unused
🛡️
Whole Life
Permanent protection with guaranteed cash value growth
📈
Indexed Universal Life (IUL)
Flexible protection with market-linked growth potential and tax-advantaged income down the road
💪
Living Benefits
Access your policy while you're alive, including critical illness, chronic illness, and disability income
🏥
Critical Illness
A lump-sum benefit when a serious diagnosis changes everything
⚡
Accidental Death & Dismemberment
Additional protection for life's most unexpected moments
🤝
Long-Term Care
Protect your assets and dignity if extended care is ever needed
🕊️
Final Expense
Dignified coverage so loved ones aren't left with the burden
Retirement & Income
💰
Fixed Indexed Annuities
Market-linked growth with downside protection and guaranteed income options available
🏦
Infinite Banking
Become your own bank using a specially structured life insurance policy, the same strategy Walt Disney and Ray Kroc used to fund their empires
🔓
Debt-Free Life
Use the infinite banking system to eliminate debt dramatically faster than traditional methods
🔑
Alternative Retirement Strategies
Retirement income strategies your broker or bank may not have access to — ask me about this one
About

Strategy. Honesty. Your Corner.

Holli Banks

Principal, Licensed Broker & Retirement Strategist

Most clients come to Banks Advantage for one thing and leave with more clarity, more options, and a stronger strategy for what's ahead.

Holli Banks is a licensed broker and retirement strategist with a background that goes beyond insurance. Before entering financial services, she spent 12 years building and running Scout Magazines, city publications for Somerville and Cambridge, MA — giving her a deep respect for people who have built something worth protecting and a passion for helping them maximize it.

The approach is simple: ask more than tell, understand the full picture, and only recommend what actually serves your goals. Clients always leave with a clearer picture of where they stand and a real sense of what's possible from here.
